automation_policy: Prepare, validate, package, upload, draft, and stage grant materials using the Aureon evidence base.
Respect CAPTCHA, MFA, phone verification, and provider account controls.
Final legal external submission buttons require exact action-time confirmation for the specific application.
Plaintext passwords, bank data, private keys, tokens, and tax files stay out of grant packs and Drive uploads.
Refresh and reconcile current IFS competition data before each application session.
Use the unified corpus as the evidence base and exclude private finance by default.
Use the existing IFS account/session for gaxlec@gmail.com.
